description: Goal: begin the fact-readiness arc from a clean tree. Current dirty files are semantic precision assertions and helper accessors, and at least one new assertion is red: myreduce/3 settles to any instead of int. Signal: git status --short is clean before any fact-engine file changes. Strategy: either land the existing semantic work under its proper ticket only when it is green, or preserve/discard it deliberately before starting this mini-epic. Do not mix this red semantic diff into the engine commits.
title: Compiler2 fact readiness: resolve the dirty semantic worktree gate
